cards.name: Sul'thraze
cards.text: Overkill: You may attack again.

cards.name: Chillmaw
cards.text: Taunt Deathrattle: If you're holding a Dragon, deal 3 damage to all minions.

cards.name: Arcane Anomaly
cards.text: After you cast a spell, give this minion +1 Health.

cards.name: Wizened Truthseeker
cards.text: Battlecry: Set the Cost of every card in both player's hands back to their original Costs.

cards.name: Gelbin of Tomorrow
cards.text: Fabled Battlecry: Put one of each Aura from your deck into the battlefield.

cards.name: Fire Sale
cards.text: Tradeable Deal 3 damage to all minions.

cards.name: Evolved Kobold
cards.text: Spell Damage +2

cards.name: Crazed Alchemist
cards.text: Battlecry: Swap the Attack and Health of a minion.

cards.name: Wind-Up Musician
cards.text: Tradeable Battlecry: Deal damage to all enemy minions. (Trade to upgrade!)

cards.name: Cascading Disaster
cards.text: Destroy a random enemy minion. Corrupt: Destroy 2. Corrupt Again: Destroy 3.

cards.name: Tortollan Forager
cards.text: Battlecry: Add a random minion with 5 or more Attack to your hand.

cards.name: Witching Hour
cards.text: Summon a random friendly Beast that died this game.

cards.name: Sandstorm Elemental
cards.text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions. Overload: (1)

cards.name: Brightwing
cards.text: Battlecry: Add a random Legendary minion to your hand.

cards.name: Sizzling Cinder
cards.text: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage randomly split among all enemies.

cards.name: Mindrender Illucia
cards.text: Battlecry: Replace your hand with a copy of your opponent's until end of turn.

cards.name: Arfus
cards.text: Deathrattle: Add a random Lich King card to your hand.

cards.name: Archdruid of Thorns
cards.text: Battlecry: Gain the Deathrattles of your minions that died this turn.

cards.name: Buy One, Get One Freeze
cards.text: Freeze a minion. Summon a Frozen copy of it.

cards.name: Eroded Sediment
cards.text: Battlecry: If you played an Elemental last turn, Discover any Elemental from the past.

cards.name: Fanottem, Lord of the Opera
cards.text: Taunt, Lifesteal This card's Cost is equal to the amount of cards in your deck.

cards.name: Ragnaros the Firelord
cards.text: Can't attack. At the end of your turn, deal 8 damage to a random enemy.

cards.name: Snowfury Giant
cards.text: Costs (1) less for each Mana Crystal you've Overloaded this game.

cards.name: Arcane Flow
cards.text: Shatter Deal 4 damage. Deal 2 damage to all enemies. Deal 4 damage. Deal 2 damage to all enemies.

cards.name: Serpent Wig
cards.text: Give a minion +1/+2. If you played a Naga while holding this, add a Serpent Wig to your hand.

cards.name: Druid of the Claw
cards.text: Choose One - Transform into a 7/6 with Rush; or a 4/9 with Taunt.

cards.name: Void Drinker
cards.text: Taunt. Battlecry: Destroy a Soul Fragment in your deck to gain +3/+3.

cards.name: Tamsin Roame
cards.text: Whenever you cast a Shadow spell that costs (1) or more, add a copy to your hand that costs (0).

cards.name: Unleash the Colossus
cards.text: Quest: Deal exactly 2 damage to an enemy on your turn, 12 times. Reward: Gorishi Colossus.

cards.name: Sandhoof Waterbearer
cards.text: At the end of your turn, restore 5 Health to a damaged friendly character.

cards.name: Midnight Drake
cards.text: Battlecry: Gain +1 Attack for each other card in your hand.

cards.name: Ethereal Augmerchant
cards.text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to a minion and give it Spell Damage +1.

cards.name: Nexus-Champion Saraad
cards.text: Inspire: Add a random spell to your hand.

cards.name: Siphoning Growth
cards.text: Destroy a friendly minion to gain 8 Armor.

cards.name: Giant Tumbleweed!!!
cards.text: Deal 6 damage to all minions. Summon a 6/6 Tumbleweed.

cards.name: Aftershocks
cards.text: Deal 1 damage to all minions, three times. Costs (2) less if you cast a spell last turn.

cards.name: Darkrider
cards.text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, Discover a Dragon with a Dark Gift.

cards.name: Underbelly Ooze
cards.text: After this minion survives damage, summon a copy of it.

cards.name: Miracle Growth
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Summon a Plant with Taunt and stats equal to your hand size.

cards.name: Infectious Sporeling
cards.text: After this damages a minion, turn it into an Infectious Sporeling.

cards.name: Giant Mastodon
cards.text: Taunt

cards.name: Dark Arakkoa
cards.text: Taunt Battlecry: Give your C'Thun +4/+4 (wherever it is).

cards.name: Energy Shaper
cards.text: Battlecry: Transform all spells in your hand into ones that cost (3) more. (They keep their original Cost.)

cards.name: Imployee of the Month
cards.text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Lifesteal.

cards.name: Carry-On Grub
cards.text: Battlecry: Get a 1-Cost Suitcase. Pack the top 2 cards of your deck into it.

cards.name: Burning Blade Acolyte
cards.text: Deathrattle: Summon a 5/8 Demonspawn with Taunt.

cards.name: Lesser Onyx Spellstone
cards.text: Destroy 1 random enemy minion. (Play 3 Deathrattle cards to upgrade.)

cards.name: Call in the Finishers
cards.text: Summon four 1/1 Murlocs.

cards.name: Kabal Courier
cards.text: Battlecry: Discover a Mage, Priest, or Warlock card.

cards.name: Inner Fire
cards.text: Change a minion's Attack to be equal to its Health.

cards.name: Sonya Shadowdancer
cards.text: After a friendly minion dies, add a 1/1 copy of it to your hand. It costs (1).

cards.text: Battlecry: Summon a 3/6 Water Elemental. Your Elementals have Lifesteal this game.

cards.name: Ur'zul Giant
cards.text: Costs (1) less for each friendly minion that died this game.

cards.text: Spell Damage +1 Battlecry: Draw a card.

cards.text: Battlecry: Gain a random Bonus Effect for each minion of a different type you've played this game. ( )

cards.text: Summon three 5/6 Elementals with Taunt. Overload: (3)

cards.name: Grand Archivist

cards.name: Bonechill Stegodon
cards.text: Deathrattle: Deal 6 damage to three random enemies.

cards.name: Far Sight
cards.text: Draw a card. That card costs (3) less.

cards.name: Carnival Clown
cards.text: Taunt Battlecry: Summon 2 copies of this. Corrupt: Fill your board with copies.

cards.name: Lesser Opal Spellstone
cards.text: Draw 1 card. (Attack with your hero (time, times) to upgrade.)

cards.name: Giant Sand Worm
cards.text: Whenever this attacks and kills a minion, it may attack again.

cards.name: Nostalgic Initiate
cards.text: Miniaturize The first time you cast a spell, gain +2/+2.

cards.name: Story of Galvadon

cards.name: Khadgar
cards.text: Your cards that summon minions summon twice as many.

cards.name: Deadscale Knight
cards.text: Lifesteal

cards.name: Kobold Librarian
cards.text: Battlecry: Draw a card. Deal 2 damage to your hero.

cards.name: Jeweled Scarab
cards.text: Battlecry: Discover a 3-Cost card.

cards.name: Elementary Reaction
cards.text: Draw a card. Copy it if you played an Elemental last turn.

cards.name: Timeline Accelerator
cards.text: Battlecry: Draw a Mech. It costs (2) less.

cards.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Freeze all enemy minions. Summon a 5/5 Frostwyrm.

cards.name: Unliving Champion
cards.text: Battlecry: If a friendly Undead died after your last turn, summon two 3/2 Zombies.

cards.name: Treacherous Tormentor
cards.text: Battlecry: Discover a Legendary minion with a Dark Gift.

cards.name: Table Flip
cards.text: Deal 3 damage to all enemy minions. Costs (1) less for each other card in your hand.

cards.name: Blood of The Ancient One
cards.text: If you control two of these at the end of your turn, merge them into 'The Ancient One'.

cards.name: Spark Engine
cards.text: Battlecry: Add a 1/1 Spark with Rush to your hand.

cards.name: Stormwind Guard
cards.text: Taunt Battlecry: Give adjacent minions +1/+1.

cards.name: Demonheart
cards.text: Deal 5 damage to a minion. If it's a friendly Demon, give it +5/+5 instead.

cards.name: Rolling Fireball
cards.text: Deal 8 damage to a minion. Any excess damage continues to the left or right.

cards.name: Weapons Expert
cards.text: Battlecry: If you have a weapon equipped, give it +1/+1. Otherwise, draw a weapon.

cards.name: Fire Plume's Heart
cards.text: Quest: Play 7 Taunt minions. Reward: Sulfuras.

cards.name: Death Metal Knight
cards.text: Taunt Costs Health instead of Mana if your hero was healed this turn.

cards.name: Onyxian Drake
cards.text: Taunt Battlecry: Deal damage equal to your Armor to an enemy minion.

cards.name: Lesser Diamond Spellstone
cards.text: Resurrect 2 different friendly minions. (Cast 4 spells to upgrade.)

cards.name: Furious Furnace
cards.text: Magnetic Also damages minions next to whomever this attacks.
